summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge recommendation is safe from this artifact because no PR has a complete merge preflight proving current mergeability, resolved review-bot comments, and a clean Codex /review. Three PRs need maintainer judgment due active author-followup, failed proof, missing proof, or failed checks; one PR is routed to central security handling because its described behavior involves auth/secrets reload and compromised credential handling; one small docs PR is kept independent pending normal merge preflight.
